 @dev Requires Basic+ identity tier

@notice Withdraw all QUSDC from vault
 @dev Requires Basic+ identity tier

 @dev Requires Basic+ identity tier

@notice Claim winnings from resolved market
 @dev Requires Basic+ identity tier

@notice Claim refund from cancelled market
 @dev Requires Basic+ identity tier

@notice Repay active loan
 @dev Requires Verified+ identity tier

@notice Add liquidity to lending pool
 @dev Requires Verified+ identity tier

@notice Remove liquidity from lending pool
 @dev Requires Verified+ identity tier
